docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMARAO, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARIANO, JONATHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CAMARAO, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARIANO, JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-30-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARIANO, JONATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-20-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDWIN CAMARAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN MARIANO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THEY HAVE AN AGREEMENT TO SETTLE THIS MATTER AND IS ASKING FOR A PROGRESS REPORT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EDWIN CAMARAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN MARIANO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED HE WISHES TO FILE A NEW CLAIM TO SEEK A NEW CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
